name: Parsley Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the eggs, milk, and cooked rice.
2. Stir in the chopped parsley, melted butter, finely chopped onion, celery salt, and salt until well mixed.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 2-quart baking dish and sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese.
4. Place the dish in a 13x9x2-inch pan and add 1 inch of hot water to the pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50-60 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
